summary: Critical gaps: test_dependency_license_checker.py missing entirely (workflow references it but doesn't exist); fixture files (package.json, requirements.txt, license-config.json) undefined. License config hardcoded in main() instead of loaded. LicenseLookup initialized empty, never populated—all deps return 'unknown'. TDD not demonstrated (no test code shown). Weak validation in run_tests_with_act.py checks vague strings ('passed', 'Job succeeded') that may never appear in act output. Workflow doesn't assert on script output, just prints. act-result.txt generation not wired into workflow steps—no guarantee it exists post-run.
